name: Beans Cubano
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, sauté the chopped green pepper and minced garlic in liquid of your choice until tender-crisp.
2. Stir in the remaining ingredients: black beans, pimientos, red wine vinegar, and oregano.
3. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 5-7 minutes until the beans are tender.
Serve with rice.
